business_ideas.idea: Tamagachi for babies: Digital pet app replicating hourly baby care needs and bonding

Wordle Rubik's Cube: Daily puzzle game in Rubik's Cube form with 5-minute gameplay

predictions.text: Adult toys and hobbies (AFOL) now represent 60% of toy industry growth at ~$2B annually
Simple stupid ideas described in few words often outperform intellectualized business theories
